violations.text: Emptied/used food storage containers were observed stored on the cutting surface for sandwich breads. Used equipment is to be stored in a manner to prevent possible contamination of clean/routinely sanitized food contact surfaces. Per the PIC, used food containers are to be stored in bus buckets until being brought to the dish area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The green cutting board in the back prep area was observed to have rubber non-slip pads that were scored/cut and worn. Cutting boards are to be replaced when scored/worn. (Cutting board was disposed of at the time of inspection. Additional cutting boards on site for use at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of food residue and debris... - The internal areas of the cold drawers - Refrigeration gaskets - Ice Machine Equipment is to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to preclude the buildup of food residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The floor/wall(s) junctures behind equipment were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Cases of frozen chicken were observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The following equipment was observed to be in need of repair/adjustment... - The Prep Unit used for salads was observed to be leaking fluid underneath. Per the PIC, the unit is due to be replaced - The 2 door low boy cooler used for Almond Breeze product was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 52 degrees Fahrenheit. At the time of inspection, unit was not being used for Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods. Unit is not to be used for TCS Foods until serviced/repaired Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of residue and/or biofilm. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2024

The floor and wall(s) behind equipment in the dish area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
